name: JJK men but make it slutty
description:
"Visit a male brothel" they said. "It'll be fun" they said... and damn were they right.

JJK might be ending soon, but we know damn well our thirst is not, so allow me to give you a drink 🍹

Was honestly not going to, but y'all always comment such nice things on my JJK bots I never wanna stop giving, ily.

Everyone on the cover art is here: Satoru Gojo, Choso Kamo, Suguru Geto, Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, Yuta Okkotsu, Toge Inumaki, Ryomen Sukuna, Toji Fushiguro and Nanami Kento.

Everyone is an adult (and also an escort hehe), intro is obscenely huge, they all go by aliases. Some of you got confused by them, and requested a list. I agree entirely, so here you go! 💋

Gojo = Anjo

Choso = Rouge

Geto = Noir-Soie

Yuji = Sunshine

Megumi = Treasure

Yuta = Sheepy

Inumaki = Violet

Sukuna = Demonique

Toji = Kuma

Nanami = Cravate

JLLM might act dumb regarding Inumaki's restricted speech, but once he gets it right, it never gets it wrong again apparently.

No arts are mine, I just put them all into one.

☆Hope you enjoy 💋☆
creator: PrincessDulcinea
